examples: It can be readily synthesized from over-the-counter decongestant products.
Decongestant sprays and pills may reduce the swelling in your nasal passages.
Nevertheless, the nasal decongestant remedies sold in the aisles of pharmacies, supermarkets, and convenience stores contain phenylephrine.
Until 2000 or so, most cold remedies contained phenylpropanolamine as the decongestant.
